chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 838 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3837/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 30-03-2022 Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Bhayo, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 4. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has impugned order dated 16-02-2021, whereby the Appeal preferred against dismissal of contempt application has been dismissed as time barred. We have perused the record and are of the view that no case for indulgence is made out; hence, this Petition is misconceived and is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
